mapper.sql: id, title, part, question, reference_answer, difficulty, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT st.*, sr.status AS study_status FROM ielts_speaking_topics st LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'SPEAKING' AND sr.content_id = st.id
ORDER BY st.part, st.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_speaking_topics st LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'SPEAKING' AND sr.content_id = st.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_speaking_topics (id, title, part, question, reference_answer, difficulty, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{title}, #{part}, #{question}, #{referenceAnswer}, #{difficulty}, #{topicTags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_speaking_topics SET title = #{title}, part = #{part}, question = #{question}, reference_answer = #{referenceAnswer}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, topic_tags = #{topicTags}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_speaking_topics (id, title, part, question, reference_answer, difficulty, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{t.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{t.title}, #{t.part}, #{t.question}, #{t.referenceAnswer}, #{t.difficulty}, #{t.topicTags}, #{t.createdAt}, #{t.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT st.* FROM ielts_speaking_topics st WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'SPEAKING' AND sr.content_id = st.id ) ORDER BY st.difficulty, st.id LIMIT #{limit}
